headline: Evergy (EVRG) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: As I will discuss in a moment, Evergy, Inc.'s large customer team continues to excel in bringing economic development to Kansas and Missouri.  The increase was primarily driven by recovery of regulated investments, growth in weather-normalized demand, and revenues from our large load customers.  Bryan will cover these results in more detail.

headline: Evergy's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y

headline: Evergy Announces First Quarter 2026 Results, Announces New Large Customer, Declares Quarterly Dividend and Reaffirms 2026 Guidance
summary: KANSAS CITY, Mo., May 07, 2026--Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) today announced first quarter 2026 GAAP earnings of $151.5 million, or $0.64 per share, compared to GAAP earnings of $125.0 million, or $0.54 per share, for the first quarter 2025.
